title: Campaign Monitor Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Campaign Monitor worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Campaign Monitor Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Campaign Monitor is beautiful emails for your business that positions itself for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Founded in 2004, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Campaign Monitor is a solid choice for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Its paid-only pricing reflects its focus on serious senders. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for agencies and teams managing multiple brands
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month, with paid plans from $11/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Campaign Monitor works best for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well. If you need something different, check the alternatives section.

faq.a: Campaign Monitor does not offer a free plan. Paid plans start at $11/month. This makes it more suited to established senders with a budget.

faq.q: What is Campaign Monitor best used for?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor is best for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Its standout features include template builder, journey designer, smart segments, which suit this use case well.

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor good for beginners?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor is aimed at users with some email marketing experience. The interface is straightforward for basic campaigns, though advanced automation features have a learning curve.

faq.q: Does Campaign Monitor have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Campaign Monitor runs an affiliate program paying varies. This is worth considering if you plan to recommend the platform to your audience.
